'''''Toral''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] that bore [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]] from [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] to work on the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star I]]. It was guarded by the newly produced [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]].

Having recently learned about the Wookiees from prisoners rescued from [[Stars' End/Legends|Stars' End]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] sent a team to [[Rescue of enslaved Wookiees|rescue]] them. [[Samuel Raider]], [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]], and [[Toalagar]] from [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]] flew [[R-22 Spearhead starfighter|R-22 Spearheads]] against the defending Gunboats and destroyed them, though Toalagar was killed during the fight. Raider and Farlander then held off [[TIE series/Legends|TIE starfighters]] launched from the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Intrepid (Imperial I-class)|''Intrepid'']], while [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] from [[Blue Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Blue Squadron]] disabled the freighter and it was boarded by a Rebel [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] and the slaves rescued.

Documents recovered on the ship, showed that it was to meet a larger convoy near [[Orron III]], which was to deliver supplies for a secret Imperial project.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']]
